name: New Zealand Salmon in Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the salmon and remove the head, tail, and fins. Cut the salmon into 1 lb steaks.
2. Place one salmon steak on a sheet of foil. Squeeze the juice of half a lemon over the steak.
3. Spread 1 tbsp butter plus salt and pepper evenly on the salmon steak.
4. Wrap the salmon steak tightly in the foil, ensuring a tight seal to keep water out.
5. Repeat steps 2-4 for each remaining steak.
6. Boil the wrapped packages in water for 20 minutes.
7. Remove the packages from the boiling water and place them in the freezer for an hour.
8. Then refrigerate the steaks for 2 hours.
9. When ready to serve, carefully unwrap the salmon steaks on a large platter.
10. Serve with warm Hollandaise Sauce, new baby potatoes boiled with mint leaves, fresh garden peas, and a suitable white wine.
This is a basic but delicious recipe. Enjoy the story of how you caught the salmon!
